name: HOUIX Route Servers
notes:
### How to participate?
Please visit http://houix.net and fill out the small form on the front page or email peering@houix.net to connect.

We currently offer 100/40/10/1G ports in Netrality 1301 Fannin

### Max Prefix Settings
Recommended limits to allow for future growth  
IPv4: 200000  
IPv6: 100000  

### Route Server Communities:
0:$peerasn to exclude your routes to $peerasn
35920:$peerasn to include your routes to $peerasn
0:35920 to exclude your routes to all peers

### Official HOUIX Extensions:
St. Louis via STLIX - http://stlix.net  
https://www.peeringdb.com/ix/2585

Kansas City via KCIX - http://kcix.net
https://www.peeringdb.com/ix/249

### Mailing List:
Please email info@houix.net if you wish to be subscribed to the HOUIX members mailing list.
